## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Checklist

<!-- Please verify the following before submitting your PR -->

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) document.
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (`black`, `ruff`, `mypy`, `pylint`).
- [ ] I have added/updated tests to cover my changes.
- [ ] All tests pass successfully (`pytest tests/`).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README, PROJECT_CONTEXT) if applicable.
